summary: Crisp soundboard capture of a legendary second set highlighted by the rare ‘If I Had The World To Give’ and a fiery Peggy‑O, despite splice gaps and missing portions.
review: The recording delivers clear, crisp soundboard quality that lets listeners hear Garcia’s intimate vocals on “World To Give” and Keith’s perfectly timed piano swirls. Musically the show is praised as an exploratory marvel with standout jams into Jack‑A‑Roe, a powerful Peggy‑O, and the rare second‑set jam that many fans call one of the best non‑thematic improvisations ever. The only drawbacks are a splice in the Playin’ jam and incomplete portions of the set.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews overwhelmingly rate the show 4‑5 stars, highlighting exceptional performance while noting only minor technical issues (splice, missing songs). Weighted combination of strong show quality and good soundboard recording yields a high overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, clear soundboard audio praised by several reviewers; however, there is a noticeable splice in the Playin' jam and the set is incomplete, leading to some criticism of missing material.

standout_songs: If I Had The World To Give
show_quality.setlist_flow: Set 2 is described as a marvel of exploration with superb transitions (jam → Jack‑A‑Roe, Playin' → Shakedown). Missing portions are lamented but do not detract from the overall flow and intensity of the second set.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia’s voice is intimate on “World To Give” and his guitar work doubles‑time notes brilliantly; also praised for blasting off with rapid 128th‑note runs on Peggy‑O.
band_member_comments.Bob: Weir was reportedly absent for the first ten minutes of the second set; his slide under Peggy‑O is noted as somewhat bothersome but otherwise not a focus.
band_member_comments.Keys: Keith’s piano swirl during the instrumental interlude is described as perfectly timed and magical.
band_member_comments.Drums: The Rhythm Devils (drummers) are called “incredible” throughout the jam, adding to the overall power of the performance.
